layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Automated tests and fixtures that verify frontend, Rust backend, and sidecar behavior.

layers.name: Frontend App
layers.description: React and TypeScript application code under src, including app shell, features, hooks, stores, and UI components.

layers.name: Tauri Backend
layers.description: Rust desktop backend commands, services, migrations, and Tauri integration code.

layers.name: Search Sidecar
layers.description: Python sidecar service for search, extraction, embeddings, chat orchestration, indexing, and storage.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation, plans, brainstorms, context notes, and onboarding material.

layers.name: Configuration And Tooling
layers.description: Configuration files, package manifests, build settings, scripts, and project tooling metadata.

layers.name: Miscellaneous Project Files
layers.description: Remaining project files that support the repository but do not fit a more specific architectural layer.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and package manifest to understand the app purpose, scripts, and top-level technology choices.

tour.title: Frontend Entry Point
tour.description: Follow the React boot path from the HTML host into the application shell and providers.

tour.title: Explorer Experience
tour.description: Inspect the feature area that drives the main file explorer workspace, previews, actions, and related UI state.

tour.title: Desktop Backend Commands
tour.description: Review the Rust Tauri command surface that connects the frontend to filesystem, search, chat, and indexing services.

tour.title: Search Sidecar Runtime
tour.description: Move through the Python sidecar entry points and runtime modules that provide search, extraction, chat, and embedding behavior.

tour.title: Persistence And Schema
tour.description: Inspect the SQL migrations and storage modules that define local state and search indexing persistence.

tour.title: Settings And Feature Flags
tour.description: Review the settings feature and feature flag UI that controls optional product behavior.

tour.title: Verification Surface
tour.description: Finish with representative frontend, Rust, and sidecar tests to understand how behavior is protected.
